reviews.review_description: It'd be cool if you can add big robots as well like like when you get farther in the game and the wall breakthrough again a bigger giant robot will come out so we got to fall off bigger robots the game fun the graphics is super cool I love the graphics The mechanics cool I like the new bomb bot it's cool it gets very challenging and we'll come to your weapons running out of bullets kind of hard dodging the lasers cuz once they put them lasers on you and they overwhelm you your dad can't really run for them want the laser hit you from even from a distance you can't really hide from it but the game's fun can't wait to see more like big robots coming from the back side walls are you going to add some kind of power up where it slows down your weapon from draining too fast like the machine gun I mean the laser machine gun when you hold the trigger it drain it something that you can give you where your gun loads faster than slow like a power up to make a gun low faster far have some kind of bombs grenades or something that we can have on us like a belt where we can hold our grenades and throw grenades at them sticky bombs some robots have different weapons that will be cool for what different robots have different types of weapons for a power up to make your shield last longer or something you can throw at the robots and electrocute them and make them explode they get electrocuted and explode this game is fun keep up the good work I like what you got going here I love mixed reality games One of your use your environment to move around Good job

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing review and for taking the time to share so many ideas.

There are a lot of great suggestions here. Big robots and boss-style enemies are definitely something I would love to add as you progress further into the waves. More enemy variety, special weapons, grenades, sticky bombs, shield boosts, energy recharge power-ups, and new combat mechanics are all ideas that fit very well with where I’d like to take the game.

I’m especially happy to hear you like the Bomb Bot and the mixed reality gameplay. Feedback like yours is incredibly valuable because it helps shape future updates.

Thanks again for playing and for all the creative ideas. More weapons, enemies, and surprises are definitely on the roadmap!

reviews.review_title: Buy before PRICE increases. Dope Game
reviews.review_description: An Unexpected jewel,  thank you for making a good high textured graphics AR game, thank you for getting it right, the guns feel good and accurate, the reload is properly implemented (automatic) and different guns and enemies make it more fun. Only can wonder what your gonna do Next .....!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for this thoughtful review and for noticing so many of the details, from the visuals to the weapon handling and combat feel. It means a lot.
Infinite Wave is still evolving, and players like you can genuinely help shape what comes next. New enemies, weapons, mechanics, progression... the roadmap is still being written. If you have ideas, priorities, or features you would love to see first, feel free to share them anytime at support@infinitewave.app. I read every message personally, and community feedback is already driving many of the next updates.
Looking forward to building the next waves together.

reviews.review_description:
I like games in MR. This game is fun too. Good graphics. It is very ok to start not from lvl 1 after failure.
Dev - please add hole in wall for first levels - to choose.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review and for playing Infinite Wave, really happy you’re enjoying the MR experience, the graphics, and the checkpoint system.
About your suggestion: “please add hole in wall for first levels – to choose”, I’m very interested. Could you tell me a bit more about what you mean exactly? Do you mean choosing where the enemy holes/caves appear during the early waves, or something different? Feedback like yours is incredibly valuable while the game evolves, so feel free to share more anytime here or directly at support@infinitewave.app.
Thanks again for supporting Infinite Wave!

reviews.review_description: with local or online multiplayer it would be the best! keep working on this great game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much, really glad you’re enjoying it.
Multiplayer (especially local one) is definitely on the roadmap, and I agree it could take Infinite Wave to another level. Before jumping into that, my current focus is expanding the core experience first with new weapons, new enemy types, and boss encounters to make every wave feel richer and more varied.
Step by step… there’s a lot more coming. Thanks for the support and for being part of this journey!

reviews.review_description: Endless fun, great experience. Worths every penny.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for taking the time to leave such a fantastic review and for supporting Infinite Wave. Reading feedback like this genuinely motivates me to keep pushing the game forward. More content, improvements, and surprises are already in the works. See you in the next wave!
